name: blumira-mcp
description: Query and manage Blumira SIEM findings, agents, users, and MSP sub-accounts — for security operations AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to triage or act on Blumira SIEM security findings. List/search findings with rich filters (status, priority, category, date range), get finding details and comments, resolve findings with a resolution code, assign owners, and add investigation comments. Manage Blumira agent devices and agent keys. MSP operators can switch between sub-accounts and perform the same finding/agent/user operations scoped to each account. Call blumira_navigate first to load the tools for a specific domain.

jwt_token.title: JWT Token
jwt_token.description: Your Blumira API JWT token (Bearer token). Provide this OR client_id + client_secret.

client_id.title: OAuth Client ID
client_id.description: Blumira OAuth2 client_id. Use with client_secret instead of jwt_token.

client_secret.title: OAuth Client Secret
client_secret.description: Blumira OAuth2 client_secret. Use with client_id instead of jwt_token.

base_url.title: API Base URL
base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://api.blumira.com/public-api/v1). Only set for staging or sovereign environments.
